scenario: presentationFor(type) — renderer + action keyed on the open `type` — for each recognized opencode file. Mirrors renderer/all-types.json's byRelPath shape. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
notes: SPECIFICATION golden — no opencode adapter exists yet. Presentation is keyed on the open `type`, so command/agent/skill render identically to the akm/claude equivalents.

SAME RESOLUTION as claude (open question 1, maintainer resolution 2026-07): `instruction` (AGENTS.md) is now a first-class KNOWN_TYPE with its OWN TYPE_PRESENTATION entry — label 'Instruction', renderer 'knowledge-md' (REUSED: instruction files are markdown read exactly like knowledge), action `akm show <ref> -> read the project instructions`. presentationFor('instruction') returns this type-specific presentation, NOT the generic {label:'Asset'} fallback.

commands/test.md.label: Command
commands/test.md.action: akm show sample-opencode//commands/test -> fill placeholders and dispatch

command/legacy.md.label: Command
command/legacy.md.action: akm show sample-opencode//command/legacy -> fill placeholders and dispatch
command/legacy.md.note: Singular-dir alias (open question 6 RESOLVED) — presentation is keyed on the open `type` (command), so it renders identically to the plural commands/test.md; only the ref/conceptId differ (command/ vs commands/).

agents/explorer.md.label: Agent
agents/explorer.md.action: akm show sample-opencode//agents/explorer -> dispatch with full prompt

skills/changelog/SKILL.md.label: Skill
skills/changelog/SKILL.md.action: akm show sample-opencode//skills/changelog -> follow the instructions

AGENTS.md.label: Instruction
AGENTS.md.action: akm show sample-opencode//AGENTS -> read the project instructions
AGENTS.md.resolved: RESOLVED (open question 1) — `instruction` is a first-class KNOWN_TYPE with its own TYPE_PRESENTATION entry: label 'Instruction', renderer 'knowledge-md' (reused — read exactly like knowledge), action mirrors knowledge's read action. NOT the generic fallback.
